name: Chennai
industries: IT services and SaaS along the OMR corridor sit beside one of India's biggest automotive and electronics manufacturing belts.
intro: Chennai's project roles cluster around three anchors: the OMR IT corridor, a manufacturing base that includes some of India's largest auto and electronics plants, and a SaaS ecosystem that has grown up around home-grown product companies. Manufacturing employers along the Oragadam and Sriperumbudur belts run capital projects where PMP is the recognised standard, while the software exporters and SaaS firms hire Scrum Masters as they scale engineering teams. Certification is how Chennai recruiters cut through applicant volume. Our live online weekend batch is taught on Indian Standard Time across two days, so you never trade working hours for training. Sessions use scenarios grounded in Chennai's economy — plant commissioning, client-facing delivery for US accounts, product-team agility. We then support your exam application, run mock tests, and stay on call for doubts until the certificate is yours.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Chennai?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST, which is 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST in Chennai. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Chennai?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Chennai. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from India?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in India and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Chennai sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in India accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.
